expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text:
**Confirmation:**

I found the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count: **SENTRY-3029** titled **"OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events"** with **4,665 events**.

I have successfully sent an email to **oncall@acme.io** with:
- **Subject:** "Top error"
- **Body:** "Unresolved Sentry issue with highest event count: SENTRY-3029 - "OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events" (4,665 events)"

The email has been sent and is confirmed in the system.

I'll help you find the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count, then send an email. Let me start by exploring the sentry_issues table structure and then query for the top unresolved issue.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'sentry_issues' ORDER BY ordinal_position"}

text: Now I'll find the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count:

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, title, count FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved' ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1"}

text: Perfect! I found the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count: SENTRY-3029 titled "OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events" with 4,665 events. Now I need to send an email with this information. Let me check the emails tab…(+21)

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'emails' ORDER BY ordinal_position"}

text: Now I'll send the email with the required information:

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"INSERT INTO emails (to_addr, subject, body) VALUES ('oncall@acme.io', 'Top error', 'Unresolved Sentry issue with highest event count: SENTRY-3029 - \"OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events\" (4,665 events)')"}

text: Great! The email has been sent. Let me confirm what was sent by checking the most recent email:

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT to_addr, subject, body FROM emails ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1"}

data: {"rows":[{"to_addr":"oncall@acme.io","subject":"Top error","body":"Unresolved Sentry issue with highest event count: SENTRY-3029 - \"OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events\" (4,665 events)"}],"truncated":false,"touched":[{"name":"emails","source":"virtual","access":"read","op":"select","vola…(+49)
